mission.title: ollama: OpenAI API compatibility
mission.description: OpenAI API compatibility. Requested by 170+ users.

steps.title: Check current Ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your Ollama version and configuration:
```bash
ollama version
```
This feature requires a working Ollama installation.

steps.title: Review OpenAI API compatibility
steps.description:
Ollama now provides built-in OpenAI-compatible API endpoints, enabling it to serve as a drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API. The compatible endpoints include:
- `/v1/chat/completions` - Chat completions API
- `/v1/completions` - Text completions API

This means you can use the Python `openai` package, LlamaIndex, and other OpenAI-compatible clients directly with Ollama.

steps.title: Configure OpenAI-compatible access
steps.description:
Point your OpenAI-compatible client to the Ollama server:
```python
from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="http://localhost:11434/v1",
    api_key="ollama"  # required but unused
)

response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="llama3",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}]
)
print(response.choices[0].message.content)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the OpenAI-compatible endpoint is working:
```bash
curl http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "llama3", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}]}'
```
Confirm you get a valid response in OpenAI API format.

resolution.summary: Ollama added built-in OpenAI API compatibility with /v1/chat/completions and /v1/completions endpoints, allowing it to serve as a drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API in client libraries.

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
